allow: Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/tmp-verify.json','utf8'\)\).lab; console.log\('tldr.len=', d.tldr.length, '| walk.len=', d.walkthrough.length, '| misc.len=', d.misconceptions?.length\); console.log\('misc[0].wrong:', d.misconceptions?.[0]?.wrong?.slice\(0,80\)\); console.log\('tldr[0].why has RFC link:', /<a href.*rfc/i.test\(d.tldr[0].why||''\)\);")
